reviews.comment: Incredible experience, from text a human to the flexibility of scheduling an appointment on a Sunday. Not many businesses provide this level of service and quality of products. Highly recommend using this company for your tinting and graphic needs.

reviews.comment: Such a great shop.  Very responsive, attentive staff.  Fit me in for two vehicles within a day or two, even on a holiday.  Work was done very fast and is perfect.  Discounts for military/first responder, and cash payment.  Recommend.

reviews.comment: Just had my 2025 Honda Pilot tinted.  The difference in temperature before and after is significantlly cooler.  The heat reduction with the UV protection is my main reason for having the tint installed.  I got 40% tint in the front two windows and clear everywhere else.  Prior to deciding to go with Frederick Window Tinting, I emailed them and had a ton of questions (probably really annoying).  The FWT handled all of my questions professionally and with patience.  My entire experience was wonderful.  The end product is perfect.  I would absolutely recommend them.

reviewReply.comment: We're grateful you chose us for your Honda Pilot tinting! It's awesome to know the heat reduction is making a difference. We appreciate your kind words about our team handling your questions with care. If you need anything in the future, we're just a call away!
